name: send_message
description: Send a text message to a chat. Agents can deliver notifications, alerts, and formatted text responses to Telegram users.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat. Can be a user ID, group ID, or channel ID.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text message to send. Up to 4096 characters. May contain HTML or Markdown formatting.
parameters.example: Hello, this is a message from an agent!

parameters.name: parse_mode
parameters.description: Text formatting: 'HTML', 'Markdown', or 'MarkdownV2'. If omitted, plain text is sent.

parameters.name: reply_to_message_id
parameters.description: If set, the message will be sent as a reply to the specified message ID.

parameters.name: disable_web_page_preview
parameters.description: Disables link previews for links in this message.

body.text: Hello, this is a message from an agent!

result.text: Hello, this is a message from an agent!
